mapper.select: SELECT review_id, user_id, movie_id, rating, content, is_deleted, is_blinded, spoiler, like_count, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by FROM reviews WHERE review_id = #{reviewId}

SELECT r.review_id, r.movie_id, r.rating, r.content, r.is_deleted, r.is_blinded, r.spoiler, r.like_count, r.created_at, r.updated_at, r.created_by, r.updated_by, u.user_id, u.nickname, u.profile_image FROM reviews r INNER JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id WHERE r.review_id = #{reviewId}

SELECT r.review_id, r.movie_id, r.rating, r.content, r.is_deleted, r.is_blinded, r.spoiler, r.like_count, r.created_at, r.updated_at, r.created_by, r.updated_by, u.user_id, u.nickname, u.profile_image FROM reviews r INNER JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id WHERE r.movie_id = #{movieId} AND r.is_deleted = false ORDER BY r.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reviews WHERE movie_id = #{movieId} AND is_deleted = false

SELECT review_id, user_id, movie_id, rating, content, is_deleted, is_blinded, spoiler, like_count, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by FROM reviews WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = false ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE reviews SET is_deleted = true, updated_at = NOW() WHERE review_id = #{reviewId}
UPDATE reviews SET is_blinded = true, updated_at = NOW() WHERE review_id = #{reviewId}
